event_claims.actor_label: board of directors of the Company
event_claims.description: The Company's board of directors unanimously determined that the Agreement and Merger are advisable and in the best interests of the Company and its stockholders.
event_claims.quote_text: The board of directors of the Company at a duly held meeting unanimously (i) determined that this Agreement and the Merger are advisable and in the best interests of the Company and its stockholders

event_claims.actor_label: board of directors of the Company
event_claims.description: The Company's board of directors unanimously approved the execution, delivery and performance of the Agreement.
event_claims.quote_text: The board of directors of the Company at a duly held meeting unanimously (i) determined that this Agreement and the Merger are advisable and in the best interests of the Company and its stockholders, (ii) approved the execution, delivery and performance of this Agreement

event_claims.actor_label: board of directors of the Company
event_claims.description: The Company's board of directors unanimously resolved to recommend adoption of the Agreement by the Company's stockholders and directed submission of the matter to stockholders at the Company Meeting.
event_claims.quote_text: The board of directors of the Company at a duly held meeting unanimously (i) determined that this Agreement and the Merger are advisable and in the best interests of the Company and its stockholders, (ii) approved the execution, delivery and performance of this Agreement, and (iii) resolved to recommend the adoption of this Agreement by the stockholders of the Company (the “ Recommendation ”) and directed that such matter be submitted for consideration of the stockholders of the Company at the Company Meeting
